title: 7 Pcs Self-Adhesive Mirror Tiles 2mm Thickened Acrylic Hexagon Mirrors Stick on Wall 16 x 14cm Flexible Mirror Sheets Plastic Mirror Tiles for DIY Home Decor Bathroom, Bedroom, Door
features: Acrylic Material: this self-adhesive mirror is made of acrylic material with a smooth surface and good texture, which is safer and does not break. Acrylic mirror wall sticker very light and easy to stick to the wall,will not break very safe for child and pets.

High clarity: Our mirror looks clearer, more textured and real, the material is flexible, not easily deformable, no oxidation and rustproof. This adhesive mirror set also comes with foam adhesive pads that are easy to attach to walls, doors and all smooth surfaces.

Easy installation: the installation process of the flexible mirror is very simple. All you need to do is apply the included sticker to a smooth wall in the position behind the lens of your choice and you are ready to use it. Very sticky, not easy to fall off, when removed, your walls will not be damaged.

DIY splicing: this self-adhesive tile mirror can be combined as desired. Whether square, rectangular or in any other shape, it looks great. This also applies to crafts. You can show your creativity in a unique way.

What you get: you will receive a total of 7 self-adhesive mirror tiles, the size is about 16 x 14cm, the thickness of the upgrade is 0.2 mm (0.07 inches). On each mirror sticker there is a protective film on the front, so you don't have to worry about hurting your hands, giving you and your family a sense of security
description: QEEYON Self Adhesive Mirrors Sheets 16 x 14cm Acrylic Mirror for Walls Home Decoration Gym Features: Wall mirrors is 2mm in thickness, better reflective effect than other similar mirror stickers in the long distance, the reflective surfaces can make the space look larger and brighter. Acrylic mirror wall sticker very light and easy to stick to the wall,will not break very safe for child and pets,convenient to move when move place, thicken double-side adhesive viscosity is stronger, will not easy fall off. High quality coating ensure great reflective effect, smooth acrylic surface keep great clarity. It is a makeup mirror, Dressing Mirror, is also a decorative mirror!Simple, easy to install, and does not take up space. You can use this to enlarge your space or illuminate the dark walls to make your home look different and more attractive. It can be use as interior decoration, beautification, makes the interior space more spacious by mirror reflection, not for use as realistic mirror. Specifications: Size: 16 x 14cm Thickness: 2 mm Material: Acrylic Note: 1.Need to peel off protective film to display a clear mirror effect. 2.Suitable for being mounted on smooth walls, such as ceramic, tiles, marble, painted wall, wooden door. Can’t be used on uneven, wallpaper, ash-falling surface. 3. If you need to clean up, please try to use glasses cloth or hair dryer to avoid scratches on the surface. Remember not to wipe the mirror surface ofen, which may cause scratches.
